channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1 — 162 replies — 648.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1

Open thread • Replies: 162 • Updated: 2026-06-26 21:33 UTC

OP

Brothers,

SpaceX has begun to rise. Its success or fall is of little importance to us in the short term.

In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.

I for one propose we spend our time learning a subject. Knowledge is the greatest wealth of all.

However, I would be remiss to not tell the truth that I haven't a clue what we should study.

So instead I suggest we create an eggregore for these threads. Others made monero-chan, bobo and sminem

I am thinking we create one based on a girl who would be willing to believe in us while we are poor and brave the pain throughout having to witness our more disappointing moments of action. Never losing faith in us, she is always there. Yes. This is how we shall spend our time.

At any rate, that is my suggestion for tonight's fun. I have to work in the morning so let's not get too rowdy. Take it or leave it. If you will take it, then be sure to double it and pass it on to the next anon.

Let us commence the general!

Come one, come all!

Early replies (first 3)

62373772
>>62373752
Jannies will surely delete these threads. Instead of creating an eggregore why not try something new and usurp an old one. It may be a derivative of one which has already been made.

62373798
>>62373772
Hello anon thanks for joining. You are poster #1. Your anime image shall be the eggregore. The "coffee" in the image is rather a good omen. We all know images with hot girls accompanied by a brief post on coffee attracts all the attention.

Now that matter is settled, help me add some links to this post here. This will be the header for the start of each general

Helpful links

>Educational materials
https://w9.kaijimanga.com/

>Looking to try the TCG route?
https://youtube.com/@alphainvestments69?si=tDAPjnRSZhyCIGP5

>Lost all hope?
https://www.indeed.com/


>Hidden in plain sight
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Limitless_(film)

>Games to strengthen you financial acumen
https://mahjongsoul.yo-star.com/

>Learn your from your betters
https://ia600609.us.archive.org/3/items/the-house-of-rothschild-ferguson-niall/The%20House%20of%20Rothschild%20-%20Ferguson%2C%20Niall.pdf
What is the name of that character in your post?

62373799
>>62373772
verily, a true fact

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62399358
Tomorrow we shall give predictive programming a try as photonics will likely be a difficult venture

62399394
10k- networth reporting in! You guys are too smart for me with all those grand ideas.

62400367
>>62398789
tl;dr

62401110
7 figure club. I already lost more than 10k today at market open. Stay poor fags

62401765
I just wrote a super long post with all sorts of trade basics and an emphasis for this group to define normal position exit conditions so you can tangibly ask anons "did you exit before, during, or after the standardized 4chan-exit signals?" Along with recommending covered calls for slow moving but trend holding markets like gold/BTc/xmr or oil when watching forex markets. 10y+dxy are good to watch too.
Blah blah blah
But this whole thread degenerated into trying to sell "art", and not every anon working together for every group success to contribute to all that participate, but rather instead for every anon to work on their own project, by themselves, but as a group selling the same products/watering down their labor's value.

>>62401110
This is who you should ask for advice. This anon only lost 1% of his shit n that's if he's only got 1m. Not a big deal. Don't you anons want to be able to lose 10k casually n be unbothered yet responsible?

62401809
>>62401765
I did it the hard way. Degree in finance. Work in finance. Almost 20 years. Been investing since the 08 crash. There's no quick trick or easy money. Crypto is bullshit. Just keep buying.

62401893
Six figures is truly hell, I miss being proud of 70k.

62403333
>>62401765
It was one art guy

62403337
>>62401765
This general also is a work in progress, I am hoping 10 generals from now we have a much better work flow, plan and ultimately success. In some capacity.

62404260
Bump

62404574
No point in this general. Fastest way to make 10k is just to work for a bit, you shouldn’t be investing

62404709
Bump

62404737
>>62373752
its a spacex thread?
its time to buy o better buy in few days one week

62405715
bump

62407354
Page 8 bump, /biz/ must be losing money again because there's an uptick in activity.

62407450
almost 9 months since i started my first job after college
this feels stagnant and joyless
what exactly do i need to do to escape wageslavery and poverty

62407931
Someone send me ten grand so I can join the club, thanks

62408558
>>62407450
What were you doing in 2017, 2021 and December of 2024?

62408565
>>62407354
Thank you, my wage job prevents me from dedicating my energies to this thread but I should have some time soon

62408611
>>62408584
Wtf are you on about dude, yes I made 54 posts over the span of 8 days. I'm surprised you're not taking your own advice and leaving 4chan.

62410044
Bump

62410051
Under 10k you just need to have a job and save cash.
You need cash flow and if you dont have shit a job is the only way to start.

62410731
Bump

62411520
>>62408558
>2017
still in high school
>2021
still in uni
>December of 2024
just graduated and was looking for jobs (i still had 0 dollars to my name at that point)

62411614
>>62373752
>>62373772
>>62373798
>>62373799
>>62373803
>post Maccari's "Cicero Denounces Catiline" (1888)
>crop out Catiline
Fuck you OP, I'm glad you're poor.

62412314
>>62411520
You could've played the memecoin casino in 2021.

62413842
Bump, I'll be free tomorrow

62416357
Bump

62417812
page 9 bump. Don't say I never did anything for you.

62418065
Almost the weekend then I can devote my energies to this thread.

And a big thank you to the poster above this post, looks like you were based after all

item.title: VOO and Chill — 93 replies — 178.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
VOO and Chill

Open thread • Replies: 93 • Updated: 2026-06-26 21:08 UTC

OP

The more I look into investing and compare the historical returns of certain ETFs / individual stocks it seems like the whole philosophy of “VOO and Chill” is equal parts really smart and retarded
It’s like a no brainer for money but even now as long as the market is in a growth period shouldn’t you at least do QQQ?
It seems so simple that’d you miss a lot of upside but the returns are honestly not bad and extremely consistent
How accurate is this assessment? It’s both so simple and guaranteed that everyone should it but also too safe so you end up missing out on more upside
I’m talking 5-20 years investing here not trading

Early replies (first 3)

62400515
Boomer funds are gay and lame

62400554
>>62400515
What qualifies as one
Why
What crypto do you want to shill

62400560
boglehead method is the tried and tested way, buy the market with an index fund that has a low fee, invest monthly, do it consistently for decades and you WILL be rich
but biz/anons don't care about being rich when they're older, they want to be rich NOW
greed is a deadly sin

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62409811
>low fee index funds
it's VTI and VXUS for me

62409901
>>62400636
lol doomer, stop spreading negativity. you will be a lot happier even if you just invested 150 a month.

62410053
>>62409901
>Realism is negativity!

62410067
>>62400493
wtf are you doing bringing common sense into my retard and bot zoo?

62410086
>>62400636
>The problem is we have people starting at age 35 with like 150 a month thinking it's going to somehow mean something.
pop quiz! how much would you expect your money to grow over 150 months (12.5 years) with a conservative 6% annual return?

62410375
Yep just bought another share of VOO

62410405
>>62403053
They are also expecting SS and medicare to buff out their income and reduce their costs. Everyone here is likely planning to have no SS or other government pension.

62410414
>>62402995
>>62403044
Really you two are dumb as fuck. Do you not understand what FIRE is?

VOO has 15% CAGR since inception. 11.75% after inflation. With even a generous withdrawal rate you can live very comfortably on it if you have enough capital. My business partner does this, goes on vacations all the time. He has a couple of million invested across UK-equivalent ETFs like VUSA. Loads of people do this, it's not the absolute best use of capital but it's a good return for how liquid and low fee it is.
>>62403044
Learn to read you fucking imbecile. I posted that only millionaires CAN LIVE OFF IT. . Anyone can invest and make gains from ETFs but you won't get rich unless you invest for decades.
>Also getting rich quick is literally the point of all this
The point of what? Investing? No it isn't. The point of ETFs? LOL. You are just some dumb teen shitcoiner with sky high time preference I can just tell. Go and buy more shitcoins so you can "get rich quick" dickhead.

62410968
>>62410414
This is why I just wanna get as much capital in there as soon as possible it just seems like something I can actually control versus chasing returns
Don’t have any ideas though

62410981
>>62407086
how about a job nigger

62411192
>>62410981
I am currently at my full time salary job right now silly

62412068
VOO bros are up bigly today

62413691
>>62412068
sweet

62413705
>>62400493
Felix and friends on youtube has a good way of putting it. Why invest in 500 companies when 50%+ are going down and sideways? If you have the time and money and a good strategy you can stick to you're better off picking stonks. But most people don't have the time, money and discipline to do so.

62413718
>>62413705
I think it's more like 20% of the s&p carries the other 80%, it is definitely lopsided. He (an ex investment banker) preaches buy and hold is a dead strategy.

62413734
>>62410053
Your "realism" doesn't sound realistic to people who actually do this stuff. It sounds retarded, like you've got no idea what you're actually talking about.

62413777
>>62413705
>>62413718
bc i cannot pick the winners, simple, look what happened today

62413963
If you don't just want to do VOO and chill only, just have a separate account at Vanguard that you treat like a savings account and deposit something there monthly to buy VOO or whatever. You'll be glad later on.

62414091
>>62412068
>checking your account daily
>investing only in one country

62414103
For me its 90% VOO
10% GPIQ
So i win even when I crab

62414142
>>62413705
>Felix and friends on youtube
>ex investment banker
>"Discover A Trading System That Makes Market Headlines Irrelevant"

62414162
>>62400493
Fuck VOO
>50% VT
>50% VTI
That's the real chill. Total U.S. investment is 81% of portfolio, you capture emerging markets, and some great companies you otherwise wouldn't have in VOO or VTI alone.

62414279
>>62414162
What’s the best way to compare the two? Track the CAGRs of VOO vs the average of VT and VTI combined

62414680
>>62414279
If you do that, its boomer tier analysis, otherwise that analysis would dictate to just buy VOO or QQQ overlooking the real value of VT/I. VT is used as a hedge if there's an exodus from U.S. markets in the next 5-10 years. VTI is used as a hedge against an exodus from bloated tech in the next 5-10 years but the U.S is still supreme (likely the case). When investment eventually settles from AI bloat and only 3-5 companies out of the current hundreds trying to pursue AI development come out on top, investment will switch into a different sector. With these etfs, you dont have to worry about what the next big thing is, which is why its the ultimate hold. Zero think. Comfy returns and they trail VOO by total return over 10 years 309% vs 325%, VT and VTI both have lowe p/e which makes the more value and less risk. Buy, hold, DRIP, and sell when you want to. This is the long end of my portfolio, and my 401k and IRAs. This is shit I am not touching for 30-40 years. Some people in my firm freak out over market turmoil, im zen, where one bucket empties, another fills for me.

62414768
>>62413705
>Felix and friends
pic is the better Felix

62414776
>>62414162
vti+vxus is more tax efficient

62414829
>>62414776
Barely, but VXUS does have the pas-through tax credit, something that amounts to $100 per $100k invested, which is better, plus you can set your parameters for how much you want allocated to international. But have you ever had to explain to a 24yo HR roastie to set up 15% portfolio allocation of VTIAX/VXUS?
>HALF HERE HALF THERE IT CANT BE THIS FUCKING HARD
The headache is not worth the hassle.

62415002
>>62410414
VOO is not 15%, its 10%
>since inception
I don't give a shit, its such a low sample that it's nearly statistically irrelevant. Here is that data from 1900-2016. US Large is VOO

62416552
Damn Breh just got a $2200 check do I just invest it boringly or do something fun with it

62417956
>>62416552
sweet

item.title: GET THE FUCK OUT OF AI STOCKS RIGHT FUCKING NOW THE BUBBLE IS ABOUT TO BURST SO FUCKING HARD THANK YOU SAM ALTMAN SELL E… — 13 replies — 52.0/hr

>>62417864
SanDisk ISNT worth $300B, y-you be sayin?

62417885
is the great crypto rotation finally here

62417890
>>62417864
NAH NIGGER, I'll be buying every DIP.

62417916
m'droolrag, lad?

62417923
>up 30% in a month
>down 10%
FREAK THE FUCK OUT AND SELL SELL SELL

62417931
>>62417923
SELL NOW OR SELL AFTER ANOTHER -30% I DONT CARE
>>62417885
YES NIGGER

62417958
>>62417923
man, I remember hearing the same about btc 8 months ago

62417985
And switch to what? Retail? Healthcare? Like it or not AI stock is the only industry showing any type of growth right now.

62417990
>>62417985
what a negative IQ does to a mf

62418000
>>62417985
LLY

62418018
>>62417990
THIS
>>62417985
DIGITAL SILVER AKA ETHEREUM
>>62417985
>AI stock is the only industry showing any type of growth right now.
literallly not true btw you are exit liquidity if you think this

62418028
>buy 500k worth of IREN shares at $47
>sell at $100
>you are now a millionaire
convince me not to

item.title: XRP under $1.00 waiting room — 23 replies — 46.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
XRP under $1.00 waiting room

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-06-26 21:10 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62412540
But what does XRP even do? At least some other projects pretend to do something.

62412710
>>62412540
All th banks will buY the whole supply to 37500$ in 14 days.

62414022
>>62412469
If XRP dips under $1, I'd unload a bunch of other stuff like DOGE I have and buy XRP dip.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62414034

Anonymous (ID: s70U1hYl) 06/25/26(Thu)21:08:10 No.62414022

62414074
>>62414034
>But what does XRP even do?
It has US gov approved stablecoin , and it's a protocol of trading for banks.

Are you banned in Google?
>xrp news.
>ripple news
https://ripple.com/press-releases/
https://ripple.com/ripple-press/ripple-to-acquire-rail-for-200m-expanding-leadership-in-stablecoin-payments/
>Ripple buys 40-year-old firm GTreasury in $1 billion deal
https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/ripple-buys-40-year-old-firm-in-1-billion-deal

62414113
>>62414074
>US gov approved
So literal cancer? I bet trump coin is "us gov approved"

62414197
>>62412540
>>62412469
>>62414113
Since Trump revived crypto, XRP despite the marketwide selloff is up over 100% and crushing all other crypto, most of which is down. The spot ETFs launched exactly when the market turned over and it still was the most successful launch of any ETF product (same for CME futures) of the year despite launching initially on relatively small issuers. Since Trump revived crypto, LINK is underperforming fucking LUNC. Lol Literally all of xsg's average is .5 maxixum and we have been anticipating and mythologizing and hoping for a marketwide liquidation like this based on exactly these reasons (particularly Japan) and have been hoping for it for that same length of time. I am still up 6x on my average but would love a last buying opportunity pre-utility pricing, particularly in the context of a liquidity crisis, as we have suspected would happen. link is down literally over 90% from its ATH 6 years ago with zero prospect to return or at real profitability, unable to support 30% of its own network function, while Sirgay dumps on you all, and it roundtrips back to 6 dollars while literally every link holder here's average is bought at about $15 where it crabbed for years, with all of early biz having bought and sold in 2018/2019 when it was interesting before they signaled they would do nothing for token holders except for fundraise on them using headlines of "partnerships" that mean nothing for holders, with the only utililty of the token being a jewish rent seeking fee injection for no reason into a product that is slower and costlier and requires more trust than competitive products. No Love Deep Cope.

62414371
>>62412469
i bought at 2.40 dammit

62414390
XRP is now a USD stablecoin! congrats xrpbros!! BQQQQQQQM

62414411
>>62414390
On the topic of USD stablecoins, link is underperforming the famously catastrophically death spiraled Terra Luna coin LUNC. Lol (See pic related in >>62414197)

62414425
>>62414411
>link is underperforming the famously catastrophically death spiraled Terra Luna coin LUNC
it's over, for real this time.

62414501
>52 wk low $1.01
lol xrp is finished

62414755
>>62412540
>>62412469
>>62414113
Since Trump revived crypto, XRP despite the marketwide selloff is up over 100% and crushing all other crypto, most of which is down. The spot ETFs launched exactly when the market turned over and it still was the most successful launch of any ETF product (same for CME futures) of the year despite launching initially on relatively small issuers. Since Trump revived crypto, LINK is underperforming fucking LUNC. Lol Literally all of xsg's average is .5 maxixum and we have been anticipating and mythologizing and hoping for a marketwide liquidation like this based on exactly these reasons (particularly Japan) and have been hoping for it for that same length of time. I am still up 6x on my average but would love a last buying opportunity pre-utility pricing, particularly in the context of a liquidity crisis, as we have suspected would happen. link is down literally over 90% from its ATH 6 years ago with zero prospect to return or at real profitability, unable to support 30% of its own network function, while Sirgay dumps on you all, and it roundtrips back to 6 dollars while literally every link holder here's average is bought at about $15 where it crabbed for years, with all of early biz having bought and sold in 2018/2019 when it was interesting before they signaled they would do nothing for token holders except for fundraise on them using headlines of "partnerships" that mean nothing for holders, with the only utililty of the token being a jewish rent seeking fee injection for no reason into a product that is slower and costlier and requires more trust than competitive products. No Love Deep Cope.

62414759
>>62414755
Why are you sharing the same reply I wrote in on a new ID to cope with having no argument? What insane level of desperation of cope is this?

62414762
>>62414197
>>62414755
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62414764
>>62414411
On the topic of USD stablecoins, link is underperforming the famously catastrophically death spiraled Terra Luna coin LUNC. Lol (See pic related in >>62414755)

62414767
>>62414755
uh oh the bot is broken

62415467
>>62414767
see
>>62414759

You jewish, kike fucking cope drained retard. Also, I accidentally used marketcap in the graph instead of price on some but not others. link is doing even worse than reality (pic related). It is losing to fucking Terra Luna's LUNC by A LOT. Stop the repressed, endless jewish sophistry and COPE.

62415477
>>62414764
You are a fucking faggot and a nigger. You can't win an argument and know your position is literally so indefensible you cannot be seen as reasonable or even remotely worth listening to if you engage from the base of it so you play extremely faggoted and jewish rhetoric games indistinguishable from how leftists engage online in rhetoric to try to paper over the material facts about your investment being a failure in price and having ZERO technical basis to recover or even justify itself at current price without being able to cover even 30% of network operation through revenues, hoping you will get to play pretend and will cognitive dissonance longer. You literally choose to not make it over just admitting you are wrong given a new marketwide price dump and opportunity to choose differently because you are a street shitting jeetnigger and a literal NPC of a greed cult that saw others get rich and bought their play after the ship sailed 7 years ago and the product never built to justify itself past the hype selloff originally. Unbelievably corny and gay. Being you is Hell.

62415920
>>62415477
Checked and rekt, holy shit linkies straight up REFUSE to make it, lmao

62416491
>>62414767
it plays up every now and then, if its the same one i think ive seen it double post a couple times in aave and smg threads

and now he's trying to run damage control manually because he somehow thinks that a panicked and angry wall of text makes the bot fuckup look better

seriously can't make this shit up lol

62417879
its over for xrp

62417965
See you guys the next 3-4 more years of .589 cents crab like the last time in 2030 were likely to pump to $3 then drop down to .50 cents again

item.title: why do BTC fags call me brown for buying alts when dogecoin has outperformed bitcoin? — 12 replies — 27.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
why do BTC fags call me brown for buying alts when dogecoin has outperformed bitcoin?

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-06-26 21:13 UTC

OP

why do BTC fags call me brown for buying alts when dogecoin has outperformed bitcoin?

Early replies (first 3)

62415059
>>62415046
Has it really?

62415170
>>62415046
I hold fucking 100k doge and bought it at 17% near ATH dont speak about doge Asshole!

62415189
>>62415046

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62415202
>>62415189
its never coming back, is it!

62415721
>>62415046
#dogearmy lives forever!

62415739
$1 DOGE IS INEVITABLE!!!!!!!

62415740
>>62415189
Cup and handle forming, btc is finished

62415753
>>62415046
because you are brown

62415759
I will buy bitcoin at the quarterly bottom of 20k level. Did you notice bitcoin moves with the general market now? Scam. Order flow doesnt mean anything.

62416173
>>62415046
a jeet created doge

62417971
doge is the one

62417980
I have family who still won't talk to me bc of this fucking memecoin. Fuck you Elon.

item.title: I have a HSA and let my medical bills go to collections — 11 replies — 24.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
I have a HSA and let my medical bills go to collections

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-06-26 21:13 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62414065
>>62414058
giga based, i've only ever paid med bills through collections but even then i only pay like half the time

62414072
>>62414058
Good move. You are actively managing your financial health and physical health at the same time

62414077
>>62414058
depends where you live

your best bet is to get on medicaid because if you have income or assets and don't pay your bills they'll take the income and assets eventually

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62414094
>>62414077
The fuck schlomo gon do

62415847
>>62414058
Based
Absolutely based

62415864
>>62414094
>>62414077
>they'll take the income and assets
wish i could see the melty when you face justice, freeloading faggot

62415927
>>62415864
They won't bother unless the debt is high 5 figs or above. Getting a lawyer involved costs thousands in initial fees and taking that case to court will cost tens of thousands alone. People just jump around EDs and UCs and repeat every couple of years to minimize the impact.

62417867
bankruptcy

62417908
>>62414077
>medicaid
>they pay your bills
>they'll take the assets

leave zero estate for your kidz

62417920
>>62414077
I wonder how much investigation Medicaid actually does, or do they just rely on the honor system.

When my wife & I signed up for SNAP one year that we were really poor, you can literally just write in the box that you have $0 in your bank account and they believe you.

They don't even check.

Elon Musk could qualify for SNAP by lying and nobody would stop him.

62417978
>>62417920
as far as I know they never check unless there's some reason to suspect you're lying. Like they check your income so if what you claimed is different from what the state reports they would probably investigate

but other than that I can't see them having the money to investigate everyone. Every now and then someone will get busted but I suppose a lot of people get away with lying

item.title: WE are the oil marines and we're not fucking selling — 12 replies — 21.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
WE are the oil marines and we're not fucking selling

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-06-26 21:06 UTC

OP

Another cargo ship just got blown up in the strait. They can't keep oil down forever.

Early replies (first 3)

62411834
>it’s true

62412180
I slurped some more oil

62413818
>we are the oil baggies

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62413900
you can sell now at 70
or at 40 when the Ukraine Russia war ends
your choice

62416450
>>62413900
Only a matter of time before reality hits the market. The emergency reserves are not infinite and it will take years to repair the damages in the gulf and in Russia.

62416754
>>62416450
They are actually 1 week away from losing pressure. Iran knows this and is in no rush.

62416764
>>62416450
This is doomer bullshit.

62417845
>>62416764
Look up direct quotes from gulf states about the amount of damage and how long it will take to go back to normal production. Even without the destruction, just the fact that they had to halt production means it will take months to reactivate facilities.
But who am I kidding, you won't look up shit because you are a stubborn low iq peak dunning kruger ass who won't change his mind anyway.

62417869
Oil reserves are the lowest that they have been in ~40 years. Even Sleepy Joe was chewing through reserves to suppress prices and that was without the turmoil in Iran.

The reserves have to be replenished. Even if the conflict ends tomorrow without any more turbulence, the damage has already been done. Some people buy a small position in oil as a hedge for their tech investments. If anything, I have a small position in tech as a hedge and most of my money in oil. Everyone will be crying come September and I will be sitting on fat stacks of cash courtesy of black gold while reminding them that I warned them.

62417932
Sell those bags when you get the chance, strikes happening now but idk how much more people will care

62417947
>>62416450
>it will take years to repair the damages in Russia.
So far, it has taken Russia less than a week to repair crude export terminals. Crude oil export volumes have not been affected.

Refinery damage is harder to see, however it's not nearly as much as the damage in the Gulf, because 50kg warheads simply do not cause much damage

62417949
>>62411825
The price is the price. It reflects a consensus amongst oil traders who are very sophisticated. Why do you think you possess knowledge that they don't? I think some oil stocks can be a good investment but derivatives on the commodities or ETFs that invest in them are a gamble.

item.title: ALTERNATIVE CASH STREAMS / SIDE JOBS / AI GRIFT / SIDE HUSTLES — 5 replies — 9.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
ALTERNATIVE CASH STREAMS / SIDE JOBS / AI GRIFT / SIDE HUSTLES

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-06-26 21:09 UTC

OP

We all wanna make money on /biz/ right? Instead of chasing returns or making big bets can we discuss actual proven ways to make some money on the side? I have been trying to find easy, not effortless mind you just easy, ways to make money on the side. The total doesn’t have to be big, just consistent. Does anyone have ideas? If it could be something friendly to a noob in that particular field, even better
I know stuff like drop shipping is a fucking scam, flipping Facebook marketplace stuff is not for me
The most common examples you see online are donating plasma and using online survey sites
Does anyone know of anything better, maybe with AI? If so please explain it in detail with examples of how much money you’ve made.
Oh and one more thing YES I HAVE A SALARY JOB AND ALREADY GOT A RAISE FOCUS ON THIS BEING ABOUT SIDE MONEY

Early replies (first 3)

62416647
There still a market for banana-in-your-butt on chaturbate or onlyfans.

Or there's always wendy's

62416661
>>62416647
Ummm how would one make money with Wendy’s silly

62417058
oil is rugging

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62417092
>>62416542
foot modelling

62417962
.

item.title: Nexo going bankrupt — 4 replies — 9.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Nexo going bankrupt

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-06-26 21:13 UTC

OP

https://www.reddit.com/r/Nexo/comments/1ubmmp9/nexo_does_not_have_a_micacasp_license/

This ponzi exchange is finally going down. They don't even have a MiCA license, but they're pretending they do because they have some German license or whatever. If their MiCA application gets rejected, and it probably will, it's game over. There's no way this ponzi scheme actually has all of its users' funds backed and stored safely.
Bitcoin will got to 10000 dollars because like last time MICA will be the catalyst that bankrupts every exchange that doesn't have the funds to pay back all the europoors

Early replies (first 3)

62416186
>>62416072
i'm amazed they lasted this long

62417966
we're gonna make it bros

62417970
>>62416072
wow so bvllish

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)
